message:
fix(whatsapp): host validation bypass, schema mismatch, and metrics gap

- connector.rs doctor(): Replace contains() host check with exact host
  extraction from URL — prevents graph.facebook.com.evil.com bypass
- connector.rs operations_info(): Remove language_code from required fields
  in send_template schema — code defaults to "en_US" when absent, so schema
  must not declare it required (was contradicting runtime behavior)
- connector.rs invoke(): Extract invoke_inner() so record_request() is
  called on both success AND error paths — metrics now track total requests
  accurately instead of only counting successes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
